name: Uninsured subcontractor caused my warehouse injury - what now?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured subcontractor caused my warehouse injury - what now?

acceptedAnswer.description: **File against your employer's comp carrier; sue subcontractor personally if negligent.** States require coverage.[1][6] Key factors: prove no insurance; assets for judgment. Labor dept enforces; comp first. Recovery possible via suit.[4]
